title: trifolium franciscanum
intro: Trifolium franciscanum, also known as the San Francisco clover, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Trifolium franciscanum are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
